min_required_version.description: Minimum app version allowed. Users below this version will see force update screen.

latest_version.description: Latest published version on Play Store.

force_update.description: Set to true to force ALL users to update immediately regardless of version.

optional_update.description: Set to true to show optional update dialog to users not on latest version.

defaultValue.value: A new version of SpeakFlow is available! Update now for the latest features and improvements.

update_message.description: Custom message shown in the update dialog.

defaultValue.value:
• AI conversation improvements
• Grammar detection enhanced
• Bug fixes & performance boost

release_notes.description: Release notes shown in the update dialog.

maintenance_mode.description: Set to true to show maintenance screen and block app access.

defaultValue.value: SpeakFlow is under maintenance. We'll be back shortly! 🛠️

maintenance_message.description: Message shown on the maintenance screen.

ai_enabled.description: Toggle to disable AI features remotely (e.g. during API quota issues).
